title: Real claim extraction proof from manual creativity source
problem: Manual ingestion (ticket-086) and domain pack loading (ticket-087) are proven, but mock claim extraction still only auto-selects fixtures for the legacy diversity chunk heuristic. Operator manual sources like synthnote.txt need a deterministic extraction floor: at least one accepted scoped claim and one reasoned rejection grounded in the source text, without live LLM.
acceptance_criteria: Manual_text source synthnote extracts via checksum→fixture map without --fixture flag.
At least one accepted scoped claim with valid quote span in source text.
At least one rejected claim with documented rejection reason.
Fixture diversity source path unchanged (GT02 green).
No validator changes, no schema migration, no live LLM, no export change.
Unit tests cover manual extraction, idempotency, and fixture back-compat.
non_goals: No live Ollama extraction, OpenAI/cloud, concept linking on manual source.
No validator changes, schema migrations, or export changes.
rollback_plan: Revert fixture map, synthnote fixture, claim_extractor checksum lookup, and unit tests.
